_comment: Test Plan — top-level orchestrator. Contains test suites, execution settings and schedule config.
description: Full regression covering search, navigation and verification flows.

execution._parallel_note: true = run suites concurrently; false = sequential
execution._max_wait_note: Global wall-clock timeout for the entire plan run
execution._retry_note: Retry each failed step up to max_retries times before marking failed
execution._rerun_note: If true, re-execute the entire failed suite from scratch after all suites finish
execution._stop_note: If true, halt the whole plan the moment any step fails

notifications._note: Overrides .env NOTIFY_ON_SLACK / NOTIFY_ON_EMAIL for this specific plan

_selected_note: Leave empty [] to run ALL suites. Populate to run a subset only.

schedule._cron_note: Standard cron expression — runs Mon-Fri at 09:00. Requires scheduler (APScheduler/cron).
